name: list
_note: sub_worlds.list returns the calling actor's OWN worlds from in-memory STATE (per-user scoping like answers/message/whiteboard). Empty input ⇒ ok:true with the actor's world array (possibly empty). Optional status filter restricts to active/paused/archived. Every returned world has is_owner === true because list is self-scoped. Live STATE + actor — never no_db.
